surya-vardhan.name: Dr. Surya Vardhan
surya-vardhan.description:
Dr. Surya Vardhan is a medical doctor with experience in clinical practice, digital health, and medical technology innovation. As a Medical Cadet at Armed Forces Medical College, Pune, House surgen at Command Hospital, Pune and as a Biodesign Fellow at IIT Bombay, he has worked on solutions to improve patient care through technology.

With a strong foundation in both medicine and technology, Dr. Vardhan has dedicated his career to bridging the gap between healthcare delivery and innovative technological solutions. His experience spans across various healthcare settings, from military medical facilities to cutting-edge research institutions.

At IIT Bombay's Biodesign program, he focused on developing practical, cost-effective solutions to address critical healthcare challenges. His work emphasizes the importance of user-centered design in medical technology, ensuring that innovations directly address the needs of both healthcare providers and patients.

Dr. Vardhan continues to contribute to the advancement of digital health solutions, working towards making healthcare more accessible, efficient, and technologically integrated.
